title: Global Markets Brief — 06 Jul 2026
intro: Risk-off sentiment dominates as USD strength accelerates amid haven flows, with precious metals surging while equities diverge and tech underperforms.

sections.heading: 🌍 MACRO TONE
sections.content: Risk-off sentiment dominates as USD strength accelerates amid haven flows, with precious metals surging while equities diverge and tech underperforms.

sections.heading: 📊 FX RANKING
sections.content:
USD +0.3% — Broad-based strength as JPY weakness and safe-haven demand lift the dollar across majors
GBP -0.01% — Resilient Sterling holds ground near 1.3350 with minimal movement in Asian trade
EUR -0.09% — Euro slips below 1.1450 as growth concerns weigh on single currency
AUD -0.06% — Aussie drifts lower on China slowdown fears and commodity weakness
CHF -0.24% — Franc weakens despite risk-off tone as USD dominates safe-haven flows
CAD -0.11% — Loonie pressured by crude oil decline below $69
NZD -0.39% — Kiwi leads losses on dovish RBNZ expectations and risk aversion
JPY -0.51% — Yen collapses to 162.15 as intervention fears fade and BoJ remains dormant

sections.heading: 💱 KEY PAIRS
sections.content:
EURUSD 1.1430 | Bias: SHORT | Watch: 1.1400 support break for extension to 1.1350
USDJPY 162.1540 | Bias: FADE RALLIES | Watch: 162.50 resistance as intervention risk escalates
AUDUSD 0.6939 | Bias: NEUTRAL | Watch: 0.6900 support amid China data weakness

sections.heading: 📈 INDICES
sections.content:
Dow Jones 52900 +1.14% — Value rotation continues as industrials outperform
Nikkei 225 69738 -0.01% — Flat despite yen weakness as profit-taking limits gains
Nasdaq 25833 -0.80% — Tech selloff intensifies on valuation concerns
S&P 500 5744.78 -0.13% — Defensive positioning ahead of key data releases

sections.heading: 🛢️ COMMODITIES
sections.content:
Gold 4175.10 +1.20% — Haven bid intensifies as geopolitical tensions and USD strength paradoxically support bullion
WTI Crude 68.17 -0.76% — Demand concerns outweigh supply risks as recession fears mount
Silver 62.63 +2.57% — Outperforms gold with industrial and monetary demand converging

sections.heading: ₿ CRYPTO
sections.content:
Bitcoin 63024 -0.89% — Consolidation below 64k continues as macro uncertainty keeps buyers cautious near-term
Ethereum 1770.72 -0.75% — Holding above 1750 support but lacks catalyst for breakout amid risk-off flows

sections.heading: 🎯 TRADE IDEAS
sections.content:
LONG: Gold 4160-4170 | Haven flows and geopolitical premium support further upside to 4250
LONG: USD/CHF 0.8020-0.8040 | Dollar strength to
